title: calliandra chiapensis
intro: Calliandra chiapensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the powder puff tree due to its vibrant pink or red, pom-pom-like flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Calliandra chiapensis include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as supporting the immune system. Calliandra chiapensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or tincture, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine and natural health practices.
